n_open.speaker: The Officiant
n_open.text: You come to us willing. So we hear it from you. Say: 'I come willing.'

n_gesture.speaker: The Officiant
n_gesture.text: Hands open. Palms up, as the willing do. — Good. You learn quickly. They always do.

n_kass.speaker: Kassian
n_kass.text: (Kassian steps behind the initiate to your left — a boy, younger than you — and closes a hand on the back of his neck until his knees fold. The boy keeps his palms up. No one stops. The Officiant does not pause.)

n_kass_after.speaker: Kassian
n_kass_after.text: Eyes forward, new blood. You'll get your turn to be looked at.

n_close.speaker: The Officiant
n_close.text: You are willing. You are kept. You are ours until the Sanctuary has no more need of the word 'you.' — The Ceremony is complete. Return to your rest.
